title: Filipino Chicken Noodle Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Filipino-inspired stir fry made with chicken, noodles, and various vegetables.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the noodles to the skillet and cook, stirring frequently, until they are slightly browned and fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the fish sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is fully coated in the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions.
